query:
-- Delete test conversation sessions
DELETE FROM conversation_sessions 
WHERE lead_phone IN ('+12025551234', '+12025559999') 
  AND lead_source = 'voice';

-- Delete associated quote leads
DELETE FROM quote_leads 
WHERE phone IN ('+12025551234', '+12025559999');
